sources.finding: A recent Codex Desktop issue reports sustained renderer/GPU activity while visible, consistent with the local renderer/GPU-focused mitigation path.
A recent Codex Desktop issue reports high local CPU during small requests, supporting local process-role monitoring rather than assuming workload proportionality.
Electron performance guidance links smooth animation/rendering to GPU/main-process work and recommends avoiding early or blocking heavy work.
Electron inherits Chromium's main/renderer multi-process model, matching the repo's separate main/renderer/GPU/app-server health sampling.
